summary: Completed backend + frontend verification for new AI Astrologer phase: session init, message reply, tier gating, dashboard/embed chat, dedicated chat page continuity, locked UX, and core dashboard/readings/daily/academy regression flows. All executed checks passed.
action_items: Optional hardening: decide if GET /api/ai-astrologer/session/{session_id} should also enforce Blueprint/Master gating server-side (currently returns eligible=false for Snapshot/Profile, while message endpoint correctly blocks).
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking defects found in reviewed AI astrologer backend/frontend implementation during this run
Tier enforcement is correct on POST /api/ai-astrologer/message (403 for non-eligible tiers) and verified functional for Blueprint user
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed snapshot + blueprint users with saved natal charts via /app/tests/seed_ai_astrologer_users.py; blueprint tier promoted in test DB for eligibility validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite now includes /app/backend/tests/test_ai_astrologer.py (session init, 403 gating, blueprint allow, message persistence). Frontend Playwright run validated locked Snapshot UX + working Blueprint chat (dashboard and /astrologer shared session) and regression load checks for readings/daily/academy/dashboard.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this cycle. Verified expected gating behavior and chart-aware response path end-to-end with public URL.
